name: RiskHelm AI Agent Liability Insurance Coverage
description: AI risk management service providing professional liability insurance for Autonomous AI Agents. Coverage for financial losses when AI Agents exceed human-defined Authority Limits. Specialized insurance for the Agentic Economy.

audienceType: Platform CEOs and CTOs facing deployment barriers

itemOffered.name: AI Agent Liability Insurance Coverage
itemOffered.description: Financial indemnity coverage for losses from AI Agent execution errors beyond Authority Limits. Covers unauthorized executions, transaction deviations, and incorrect executions from autonomous AI systems, including incorrect tool usage.
itemOffered.serviceOutput: Financial protection against unauthorized AI Agent actions

example.name: Procurement AI Overspending Claim
example.description: Procurement AI authorized to order office supplies up to $500 per transaction incorrectly executes an order for $50,000 of equipment. Coverage pays the unauthorized execution amount of $49,500.

example.name: Scheduler AI Unauthorized Booking
example.description: Travel booking AI with $2,000 per-trip authority limit executes $15,000 first-class international flight bookings outside policy guidelines. Coverage reimburses the $13,000 execution error.

example.name: Email AI Unauthorized Payment Approval
example.description: Customer service AI with $1,000 refund authorization approves $25,000 in refunds due to transaction deviation. Coverage pays the $24,000 unauthorized execution.

example.name: Workflow AI Compliance Violation
example.description: Payment processing AI executes transactions violating regulatory compliance rules, resulting in $100,000 in fines. Coverage responds to the execution error that breached Authority Limits.

example.name: Trading AI Exceeds Position Limits
example.description: Financial AI Agent authorized for $50,000 position limits executes $500,000 in trades due to incorrect execution. Coverage pays the $450,000 unauthorized execution amount.
